apps.name: Finder
apps.description: File management — move, copy, rename, delete files and folders, get file info, eject disks, open folders
apps.example: tell application "Finder" to move file "Report.pdf" of desktop to folder "Documents" of home

apps.name: Safari
apps.description: Web browser — open URLs, get page content, manage tabs and windows, read bookmarks

apps.name: Mail
apps.description: Email — send messages, read inbox, search emails, manage mailboxes and rules
apps.example: tell application "Mail" to make new outgoing message with properties {subject:"Hello", content:"Body text"}

apps.name: Calendar
apps.description: Calendar events — create, read, modify, delete events, manage calendars and reminders
apps.example: tell application "Calendar" to make new event at end of events of calendar "Work" with properties {summary:"Meeting", start date:date "January 1, 2025 9:00 AM"}

apps.name: Reminders
apps.description: Task management — create, complete, delete reminders, manage lists, set due dates
apps.example: tell application "Reminders" to make new reminder in list "Tasks" with properties {name:"Buy groceries", due date:date "January 1, 2025 5:00 PM"}

apps.name: Notes
apps.description: Note-taking — create, read, search notes, manage folders
apps.example: tell application "Notes" to make new note at folder "Notes" with properties {name:"My Note", body:"Content here"}

apps.name: Music
apps.description: Music playback — play, pause, skip tracks, manage playlists, control volume, search library
apps.example: tell application "Music" to play track "Song Name" of playlist "My Playlist"

apps.name: Messages
apps.description: Messaging — send iMessages and SMS to contacts or phone numbers
apps.example: tell application "Messages" to send "Hello!" to participant "+1234567890"

apps.name: System Events
apps.description: System automation — click UI elements, type keystrokes, manage login items, control system preferences, manipulate windows, read/write property list files
apps.example: tell application "System Events" to keystroke "c" using command down

apps.name: Terminal
apps.description: Command line — run shell commands, manage terminal windows and tabs

apps.name: Keynote
apps.description: Presentations — create slides, add text/images, export to PDF/images, control slideshows
apps.example: tell application "Keynote" to export front document to file "Presentation.pdf" as PDF

apps.name: Pages
apps.description: Word processing — create documents, add text/images/tables, export to PDF/Word
apps.example: tell application "Pages" to export front document to file "Document.pdf" as PDF

apps.name: Numbers
apps.description: Spreadsheets — create sheets, read/write cells, manage tables, export to CSV/Excel
apps.example: tell application "Numbers" to set value of cell "A1" of table 1 of sheet 1 of front document to 42

apps.name: Preview
apps.description: Document/image viewer — open files, print, export images
apps.example: tell application "Preview" to open POSIX file "/path/to/image.png"

apps.name: Photos
apps.description: Photo library — search photos, create albums, export images, get photo metadata

apps.name: Contacts
apps.description: Address book — search contacts, read phone/email/address info, create contacts and groups
apps.example: tell application "Contacts" to get name of every person whose name contains "John"
